chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Special Sales Tax Reference Application Nos. 23 to 37 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES For orders as to non-prosecution of Reference Applications as office objections not complied with since 01.01.2022. -------------- 11.02.2025. None present on behalf of the Applicant nor any intimation received. Matter is pending in non-prosecution since 2022. Accordingly these Reference Applications are dismissed for non-prosecution. Office to place copy of this order in the connected Reference Applications. JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz
